name: Ground Beef and Vegetable Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef in a large pot.
2. Add onion and garlic; cook until softened.
3. Stir in green peppers and cook for another minute.
4. Add broken-up tomatoes, basil, potatoes, and hot water.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer, covered, until potatoes are tender (about 30-40 minutes).
7. Serve warm. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
